query:
ALTER TABLE users 
ADD COLUMN passwordHash VARCHAR(255) NULL,
ADD COLUMN emailVerified BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
ADD COLUMN verificationToken VARCHAR(64) NULL,
ADD COLUMN verificationTokenExpiry TIMESTAMP NULL,
ADD COLUMN resetToken VARCHAR(64) NULL,
ADD COLUMN resetTokenExpiry TIMESTAMP NULL;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host ***REMOVED*** --port 4000 --user ***REMOVED*** --database ***REMOVED*** --execute ALTER TABLE users 
ADD COLUMN passwordHash VARCHAR(255) NULL,
ADD COLUMN emailVerified BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
ADD COLUMN verificationToken VARCHAR(64) NULL,
ADD COLUMN verificationTokenExpiry TIMESTAMP NULL,
ADD COLUMN resetToken VARCHAR(64) NULL,
ADD COLUMN resetTokenExpiry TIMESTAMP NULL;
